title: vriesea × retroflexa
intro: Vriesea × retroflexa, also known as the "Resurrection Plant", is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Bromeliad family and is known for its ability to revive itself after drying out. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Vriesea × retroflexa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in traditional medicine, and it can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
